title: bihai librata
intro: Bihai librata, also known as the "Butterfly Pea", is a type of flowering plant native to tropical Asia, characterized by its vibrant blue flowers and edible flowers. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bihai librata include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, as well as acting as a natural food coloring. Herbal preparations of Bihai librata include tea, powder, and capsules, which can be consumed for its medicinal and health benefits.
